seoTitle: Lake Barrine vs Lake Clarendon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Barrine and Lake Clarendon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Barrine vs Lake Clarendon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Barrine and Lake Clarendon.
heading: Lake Barrine vs Lake Clarendon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Barrine, Queensland and Lake Clarendon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Barrine has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Lake Clarendon (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Barrine or Lake Clarendon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Barrine has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Lake Clarendon scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Barrine scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Clarendon scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Barrine or Lake Clarendon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Barrine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
